message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Full clean restart - synthesis will produce clean netlist without amuxbus ports ==="
echo "Wrapper.v already patched (102 amuxbus ports removed)."
echo "Start: $(date)"
echo ""

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

# Clean run with --overwrite - fresh ODB from patched wrapper.v
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_clean.log 2>&1 &

CLEAN_PID=$!
echo "Clean run PID: $CLEAN_PID"
echo "Log: /tmp/librelane_clean.log"
sleep 10
ps -p $CLEAN_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_clean.log` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Full clean restart - synthesis will produce clean netlist without amuxbus ports ==="
echo "Wrapper.v already patched (102 amuxbus ports removed)."
echo "Start: $(date)"
echo ""

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

# Clean run with --overwrite - fresh ODB from patched wrapper.v
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_clean.log 2>&1 &

CLEAN_PID=$!
echo "Clean run PID: $CLEAN_PID"
echo "Log: /tmp/librelane_clean.log"
sleep 10
ps -p $CLEAN_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_clean.log
